description: Untrusted remote dApp tab webviews (one per open tab, labeled dapp-<id>). Granted the app-defined wallet_request bridge command (allow-wallet-request) and the narrow, http(s)-validated open_external_url command (allow-open-external-url) — and nothing else. No core:*/fs:*/shell:* and no opener:* (the page never reaches the opener plugin directly). This is the wallet's security boundary.
